nuggets.headline: Beyond the beats, Pete Rango is deeply invested in shaping the next generation of creative minds.
nuggets.text: Known professionally as Pete Rango, Peter Arango co-founded Life Is Valuable (L.I.V.), a nonprofit in Richmond, Virginia. Through initiatives like Dream Labs, he provides hands-on music production and digital arts education to underserved youth, fostering creativity and entrepreneurship within the community.

source.title: Pete Arango
source.quoteSnippet: Pete Arango, also known as Pete Rango, is a Colombian-born music producer... He is the co-founder of Life Is Valuable (L.I.V.), a nonprofit organization dedicated to empowering underserved youth through creative mentorship and digital arts education.

nuggets.headline: The atmospheric electronic sound of 'Oms at Play' kicks off an album-long collaboration with fellow artist Xmane.
nuggets.text: 'Oms at Play' is the opening track from Pete Rango's 2022 album, 'Savage Planet,' which is entirely a collaborative effort. Every song on the three-track electronic album, including this one, features the distinct contributions of artist Xmane.

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: Savage Planet has 3 songs sung by Pete Rango. 1 Oms at Play ft. Xmane...

nuggets.headline: If the chill, atmospheric electronic sound of 'Oms at Play' resonates with you, then you'll likely vibe with the lush soundscapes of Tycho.
nuggets.text: For another artist who crafts beautiful, instrumental electronic journeys, check out Tycho. His music often combines melodic synth lines with organic textures and a relaxed, rhythmic pulse, perfect for those who appreciate ambient electronic music with a strong emotional core, similar to the vibe created by Pete Rango and Xmane on 'Oms at Play'.

source.title: Say it - song and lyrics by Mavi Taylor, Pete Rango | Spotify

artistSummary: Colombian-born artist and producer Pete Rango, also known as Peter Arango, blends his music career with a passion for community. Based in Richmond, Virginia, he's known for his electronic and R&B-infused sound, while also empowering underserved youth through digital arts education.
